title: sokinochloa australis
intro: Sokinochloa australis, also known as Australian windmill grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sokinochloa australis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
